title: Direct HTML output in action file instead of Smarty template
description: An action file echoes HTML markup directly instead of delegating to a .tpl template, breaking separation of concerns and theming.
explanation: CMSMS modules must use Smarty templates for HTML output. Direct echo of HTML in action files prevents admin theme integration and makes the UI unmaintainable.
fix: Move HTML to a .tpl file. Assign data via $smarty->assign() and render with fetch().
